home.title: Home
home.description: A neutral starting point for the template application with shared UI, auth flows, and reusable layout patterns.

openGraph.title: Home
openGraph.description: A template application ready to be adapted into your own service.

home.heroDescription: This template includes authentication, routing, persistence, and shared UI patterns so you can adapt it into a custom service without rebuilding the foundation.
home.featuresDescription: Opinionated defaults you can rename, extend, or remove — edit this section to describe your product.
home.extensionsTitle: Where to plug in your own logic
home.extensionsDescription: Placeholder ideas — replace with integrations, partners, or workflows your users care about.
home.ctaDescription: Clone the template, create your first workspace, and shape the app around your domain.

routing.title: App Router & layouts
routing.description: Route groups, metadata, and shared shells you can reshape for marketing, auth, and authenticated areas.

actions.title: Server actions & validation
actions.description: Typed mutations with Zod, protected actions, and cache invalidation patterns ready to extend.

database.title: Prisma & PostgreSQL
database.description: Schema, migrations, and a singleton data layer — point DATABASE_URL at your database and evolve the model.

auth.title: Better Auth & OAuth
auth.description: Session handling and social providers; configure secrets and callback URLs for your environments.

features.title: Feature-sliced modules
features.description: Business logic grouped under features/ with repositories, actions, and routes to mirror your domain.

ui.title: shadcn/ui & Tailwind
ui.description: Accessible primitives and tokens — swap themes, add screens, and keep UI consistent as you grow.

clients.title: REST or GraphQL clients
clients.description: Add SDKs or fetch wrappers for the APIs your product depends on.

webhooks.title: Inbound webhooks
webhooks.description: Expose routes that turn provider events into your own domain records.

storage.title: File & object storage
storage.description: Optional S3-style storage hooks for uploads when your feature needs blobs.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Your account has been created and a default workspace is ready. Here’s what this template includes.
welcome.includedDescription: Same overview as the public landing page — edit copy in template-landing-content.ts.

explore.title: Explore the default workspace
explore.description: A default workspace is ready. Find it in the sidebar.

customize.title: Customize the codebase
customize.description: Add your domain models, routes under src/app/, and feature modules under src/features/.

ship.title: Ship
ship.description: Deploy with your hosting provider and iterate — this template is only the foundation.

homeCta.title: Ready to continue?
homeCta.description: The template is ready. Open the dashboard and adapt it to your own service.
